_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalized Human Schwann Cell Lines Derived From Tumors of Schwannomatosis Patients.

_contextSnippet: At passage 3 the SWN cells were transfected with a lentivirus encoding SV40 large T antigen...As of the submission of this manuscript, the SWN cells have been passaged 11 times since immortalization with SV40. Total passaging since initial dissociation is 14.
details: Successfully immortalized schwannomatosis cells at passage 3, with cells maintaining viability through 14 total passages since initial dissociation
